shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,90p' src/date_utils.ts && rg -n \"new Date\\(value|parseISO|isValid\\(.*new Date|strictParsing\" src | head -80"
/bin/bash -lc "git log --all -S'new Date(value)' --oneline -- src/date_utils.ts && git log --all -S'parseDate(' --oneline -- src/date_utils.ts | head -20"
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"export function isValid|function isValid\" src/date_utils.ts | head -10 && sed -n '620,645p' src/test/date_utils_test.test.ts"
